description:
With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2024 Porsche Cayman, 2.0L TC F4, RWD, 300 bhp, 6 Speed Manual. AED 239,000 or AED 3,744 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years 
 - Mileage only 11,709 KM - Porsche Warranty Valid Until August 2026 (Extendable) - Full Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Racing Yellow - 6 Speed Manual Transmission - Front And Rear Parking Sensors - Sports Exhaust - 18 Inch 718 Cayman Wheels - Leather Steering Wheel - Instrument Cluster With 4.6- Inch Colour Display
